title: Vanilla Journeys +
description: This Modpack is a spiritual successor to my Vanilla Adventures +, However with this one I intend to keep the core mechanics as Vanilla as possible.
body:
## What is the goal of this modpack?  
**The goal is to keep the classic Vanilla Minecraft feel while introducing meaningful improvements that enhance immersion and gameplay. The core mechanics remain unchanged, but with better world generation, enhanced sounds, and subtle tweaks, the world feels more alive.**

## How does this improve upon the Vanilla Minecraft feel?  

**This modpack primarily improves upon Vanilla Minecraft through improving world generation and introducing new structures that blend seamlessly into the game. Through these changes minecraft is given richer feel:**
- [**Incendium**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/incendium) - _Enhances Nether biomes and structures_
- [**Enderscape**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) - _Complete End Overhaul_ **(1.2.0+)**
- [**Nullscape**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) - _End World Gen rework_ **(1.0.01-)**
- [**Structory**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory) - _Adds new villages_
- [**Tectonic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) - _Overhauls terrain generation_
- [**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - _Adds new biomes and structures_
- [**Tidal Towns**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tidal-towns) - _Introduces coastal villages_  
##
**Beyond terrain, the world has better immersion from new sound design, improved visual effects. and more. These details help make exploration dynamic and engaging:**
- [**AmbientSounds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) - _Adds nature sounds_
- [**Cave Dust**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust) - _Introduces dust in caves_
- [**Cool Rain**](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain) - _Improves rain audio_
- [**First-Person Model**](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) - _Shows yourself in first-person_
- [**Immersive Thunder**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) - _Makes thunder more dynamic_
- [**More Mobs**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-mobs) - _Introduces new mob variants_
- [**Not Enough Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - _Refines player animations_
- [**Particular**](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular) - _Expands particle effects_
- [**Presence Footsteps**](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - _Enhances footstep audio_
- [**Serene Seasons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) - _Adds seasonal transitions_
- [**Sound Physics Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) - _Improves echo and acoustics_
- [**Sounds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) - _Expands player interaction sounds_
- [**Spawn Animations**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spawn-animations) - _Creates mob spawn effects_
- [**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - _Adds subtle particle effects_
##
**This modpack also introduces new items and mechanics into the game that allow more personalization to your gear:**
- [**Enchancement**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) - _Revamps and adds to enchanting system_
- [**Lootr**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) - _Instanced loot for players_
- [**Soul Fire'd**](https://modrinth.com/mod/soul-fire-d) - _Expands soul fire mechanics_
- [**Soul Link**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/soul-link) - _Prevents gear loss_
- [**Tool Trims +**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tool-trims) [**Elytra Trims**](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims) - _Enhances item customization_
- [**Waystones**](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - _Enables fast travel_
##
**A few small tweaks make managing inventory and gameplay more intuitive, reducing frustration and making everything flow smoother:**
- [**Detail Armor Bar**](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) - _Displays armor durability_
- [**InvMove**](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - _Allows movement in inventory_
- [**Mouse Tweaks**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - _Improves inventory controls_
##
**Some additional mods that enhance the experience in subtle and intuitive ways:**
- [**Advancement Plaques**](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) - _Visual effects for advancements_
- [**Explorer’s Compass**](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) - _Helps locate biomes and structures_
- [**Shulker Box Tooltip**](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - _Displays contents of Shulker Boxes_
- [**Simple Voice Chat**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - _Adds proximity-based voice chat_
- [**Trade Cycling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling) - _Allows cycling through villager trades_
##
**With all of this there is also a few Resource Packs introduced as well that you may know:**
- [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) - _Changes crop visuals_
- [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - _Gives mobs new animations_
- [**Fresh Moves**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - _Adds new animations to the player_
- [**Low On Fire**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire) - _Lowers fire on-screen effect_
- [**Simple Grass Flowers**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers) - _Adds new texture to all grasses_
